name: Blower Fan
description: This is a centrifugal blower fan, the heavy-duty cooling solution for tight spaces. Unlike a standard axial fan that moves air straight through, this unit pulls air in and exhausts it at a 90-degree angle to create high-pressure airflow. It’s a classic piece of 'salvaged' gear, probably pulled from a server or a projector to keep a nearby Raspberry Pi from thermal throttling under a heavy load.
